title: The Elders Hunt the Broadcast
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Robin, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Franky, Bonney as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This won't be a repeat of clover.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: He means to finish what Ohara started!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It was a sweet girl crying out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will not surrender our military might to you-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If anyone's gonna pull off an impressive rescue of Bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not gonna cut you slack just 'cause you're Senile!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is a pirate's fight, you geezer!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
